reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of institutions, narrative smoothing, and bias; does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links architectural modeling, inductive closure, institutional speech acts, and aestheticized privilege into one cautionary frame.
falsifiable_why: Testable via model audits, historical counterexamples, and comparisons between declared norms and actual discovery mechanisms.
explanation: It warns that growth rhetoric can mask inherited filters, institutional blind spots, and privilege sweetened by retrospective storytelling.
